cacheSemantics.warm: Prime engine cache before timed run, then run from local persistent cache only (Doppler OPFS; TJS persistent browser cache).
cacheSemantics.cold: Wipe engine-specific persistent cache state before run (Doppler OPFS/profile wipe; TJS profile wipe).
